message:
fix: Multiple codegen fixes for CPython test compatibility

- Add pub const prefix for module-level classes in module mode
- Escape Zig keywords (fn, test, etc.) when emitting function names in calls
- Fix assertRaises for complex attribute expressions (dict literals, etc.)
- Fix assertRaises for builtin type methods (int.__new__ -> runtime.int__new__)
- Add argument validation to getattr/setattr/hasattr to prevent panics
